case_title: BUCK, LAWRENCE et al VS LUI, ALEX et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, ALEX

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LUI, ALEX LAFAYETTE MANOR APARTMENTS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BUCK, LAWRENCE WENINGER, ANDREA NO PROOF OF DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
